title: stevia seleriana
intro: Stevia seleriana, also known as yerba dulce, is a perennial herb native to the Andean region of South America, belonging to the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria, viruses, and fungi, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Stevia seleriana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and lowering blood pressure, making it a popular herbal remedy for treating conditions such as high blood pressure, diabetes, and digestive disorders. Stevia seleriana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, and is often used as a natural sweetener due to its sweet-tasting leaves.
